scripts.copy-wasm: mkdir -p ext/wasm && cp node_modules/web-tree-sitter/web-tree-sitter.wasm ext/wasm/ && cp node_modules/tree-sitter-typescript/tree-sitter-typescript.wasm ext/wasm/
scripts.build: npm run copy-wasm && esbuild src/sw.js --bundle --format=esm --external:module --external:fs --external:path --outfile=ext/sw.js && esbuild src/offscreen.js --bundle --format=esm --external:module --external:fs --external:path --outfile=ext/offscreen.js
